title: Anodopetalum biglandulosum
taxonomy: Anodopetalum biglandulosum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Proteaceae, native to Australia. It is a part of the genus Anodopetalum, which consists of several species. The plant is commonly found in the southeastern regions of Australia, particularly in New South Wales and Victoria. Anodopetalum biglandulosum is a shrub or small tree that grows up to 5 meters in height. Its classification as a member of the Proteaceae family is due to its similarities in leaf and flower structure to other species within this family.
